basic_details.job_title: CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Special Public Prosecutor (Special PP / Special Counsel) for CBI
basic_details.department: Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI), Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Govt. of India
basic_details.organization_name: B. L. Meena, IPS - SP & Head of Branch, CBI ACB, Dhanbad
basic_details.short_information: CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026: Get the latest CBI ACB Dhanbad recruitment notification 2026 for 1 Special Public Prosecutor (Special PP) vacancy for conducting trial in CBI cases in the Courts of Dhanbad, Jharkhand. Applications are invited from eligible Advocates in the prescribed proforma. The last date to apply online is 23rd May 2026. Find CBI ACB Dhanbad vacancy details on the official CBI website www.cbi.gov.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming CBI Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026" notifications for eligible advocates. Also know the dire

important_dates.interaction with cbi interaction committ: Only shortlisted candidates will be called - date to be intimated separately

application_fee.details: The professional fee of the Special Public Prosecutor (Special Counsel) appointed/engaged will be governed by the terms and conditions contained in DoPT letter No. 225/19/2023-AVD-II dated 08.04.2024. The revised fee structure applicable for courts at places other than Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, and Chennai (such as Dhanbad) is as follows: | (A) Fee for Courts at Places other than Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata & Chennai (applicable to Dhanbad) | (B) Other Entitlements (applicable for all locations)

age_limit.details: No specific age limit has been prescribed in the advertisement for this post. The minimum eligibility of 10 years standing as an Advocate with criminal law experience effectively sets the minimum qualification threshold. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for any age-related conditions.

qualification.education_qualification: LLB (Bachelor of Laws) from a recognized University
qualification.experience: Experience at Bar in handling criminal cases
qualification.details: Eligibility criteria for applying for the post of Special Counsel/Special Public Prosecutor for CBI are as under. Candidates must fulfill all conditions as on the closing date of online application (23/05/2026). Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interaction by CBI.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Special Public Prosecutor (Special Counsel) for CBI

category_wise_vacancy.Post Name: Special Public Prosecutor (Special Counsel) for CBI

selection_process: Stage 1 Online Application submission with prescribed proforma and supporting documents uploaded through the given link
Stage 2 Shortlisting of eligible candidates by CBI based on eligibility, experience, and case history
Stage 3 Interaction with CBI Interaction Committee - shortlisted candidates to appear with all original documents
Stage 4 Final appointment/engagement as Special Public Prosecutor for minimum 03 years

Applications will be reviewed and only shortlisted candidates will be called for interaction by CBI. Applicants shall have to bring all the uploaded and supporting documents in original during the interaction with the CBI Interaction Committee. Incomplete applications
or applications received after the last date will not be considered. Candidates who apply will not be allowed to withdraw their candidature subsequently.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the prescribed online link provided by CBI ACB Dhanbad. Hard copy or offline applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. The complete application in the prescribed proforma along with all requisite documents should be uploaded through the online link. Applications received incomplete, offline, or after the last date of 23/05/2026 will not be considered. Applicants should note that once submitted, candidature cannot be withdrawn.
Applicants shortlisted for interaction must appear before the CBI Interaction Committee with all uploaded and supporting documents in original.
Documents to be Submitted / Uploaded Along with the Application (Prescribed Proforma):
Educational Qualification certificates (LLB degree and other academic documents)
Enrolment Certificate as an Advocate with the Bar Council (with date and place of enrolment)
Experience at Bar for 10 years or more as an Advocate with experience in handling criminal matters
Unconditional willingness/consent to work on general terms and conditions approved by the Government of India from time to time
Details of important criminal cases handled by the applicant Advocate (at Subordinate Courts, High Court, and Supreme Court)
Details of cases handled on behalf of CBI, Central Govt. Ministries/Departments, and State Govt. Ministries/Departments
Information regarding current workload, cases in hand, and cases belonging to CBI/Central Govt./State Govt. organizations
Details of whether working as Panel Lawyer/Standing Counsel/Legal Adviser in Central/State Govt. Ministries/Departments
Apply Online at: Link to be provided by CBI ACB Dhanbad - check official CBI website or contact [email protected]
important_instructions: Only eligible Advocates with minimum 10 years of standing at Bar with criminal law experience are eligible to apply. Applications must be submitted online only - offline/hard copy applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. Incomplete applications or applications received after the last date (23/05/2026) will not be considered. Once submitted, candidature cannot be withdrawn. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interaction with the CBI Interaction Committee. Shortlisted candidates must bring all uploaded and supporting documents in original during the interaction. Professional fee will be governed strictly as per DoPT letter No. 225/19/2023-AVD-II dated 08.04.2024. The engagement period is for a minimum of 03 years. The Special Public Prosecutor shall be required to give unconditional willingness/consent to work on the general terms and conditions as approved by the Government of India from time to time. All decisions of CBI ACB Dhanbad regarding eligibility, shortlisting, selection, and engagement are final and binding.

faq.question: Q1. What is CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026 is a notification issued by the Central Bureau of Investigation, Anti Corruption Branch, Dhanbad for engagement of one Special Public Prosecutor to conduct CBI cases in the Trial Courts of Dhanbad, Jharkhand. The appointment is on a contractual basis as per Government of India terms and DoPT fee guidelines.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in CBI ACB Dhanbad Special PP Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the post of Special Public Prosecutor (Special Counsel) in CBI ACB Dhanbad under the 2026 recruitment. The selected advocate will handle trial work in CBI cases pending before the Trial Courts of Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026 is 23 May 2026, as mentioned in the vacancy notice and online application link on the CBI website. Applications submitted after this date will not be considered.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants must have an LLB degree from a recognized university, be enrolled with a State Bar Council, and possess at least 10 years’ standing at the Bar with substantial experience in conducting criminal cases. They must also be willing to work on the general terms and conditions approved by the Government of India for CBI Special Public Prosecutors.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age limit for CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor advertisement does not generally prescribe a specific upper age limit; instead, it emphasizes a minimum of 10 years’ standing as an Advocate with criminal law experience. Candidates should still refer to the official notification to confirm if any age‑related conditions are mentioned.

faq.question: Q6. What is the period of engagement for CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor 2026?
faq.answer: The period of engagement for the CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor is typically a minimum of 3 years, subject to satisfactory performance and the terms specified in the offer of engagement. The exact tenure is mentioned in the recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the professional fee for CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor?
faq.answer: The professional fee for the CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor is governed by DoPT letter No. 225/19/2023‑AVD‑II dated 08.04.2024, which specifies revised fees for appearances, drafting, conferences, travel, and out‑of‑pocket expenses for Special Counsel engaged by CBI. The Dhanbad posting falls under the slab for courts at places other than Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata and Chennai.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply online for CBI ACB Dhanbad Special Public Prosecutor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible advocates can apply online through the dedicated “Apply Online” link available under the “Vacancies” section of the official CBI website, where the job title is shown as “Advertisement for appointment / engagement of Special Public Prosecutor in CBI ACB, Dhanbad to conduct CBI cases in trial courts.” Applicants must fill the prescribed proforma and upload all required documents.
